[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01110001 4
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 11001000 3
7 11101111 7

01 10 11001000 3 match 6
12 21 00100110 3
23 32 00100000 1
34 43 10001000 2
45 54 11010001 4
56 65 00000101 2
67 76 00000001 1
70 07 01000000 1

13 31 10101000 3
24 42 00000010 1
35 53 10100000 2
46 64 00001011 3
57 75 01110001 4 match 0
60 06 00001000 1
71 17 01100001 3

37 73 00100000 1
